problem: Chronic pain affects over 3 months for millions of people, often leading to medication dependency and poor quality of life. Traditional treatments focus on symptoms rather than retraining the brain-nervous system connection.
solution: Online pain management program using mind-body techniques to break the chronic pain cycle. Combines guided pain relief education, CBT, meditation library, physiotherapy exercises, yoga, and breathing routines. Evidence-based approach to retrain the nervous system.
